title: An Introduction: MSU ORA — New Faculty Development Seminar Slides (Kamangar)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2022-10-10 New Faculty Development Seminar 'An Introduction: MSU ORA' presented by Farin Kamangar, MD, PhD. The orientation talk that opens the New Faculty Development Seminar series — introduces MSU ORA's organization, services, and staff.
